2605.25954.title: Step-TP: A Grounded, Step-Level Dataset with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for LLM-Guided Tensor Program Optimization
2605.25954.paper_summary: Despite the strong reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), optimizing the execution efficiency of tensor programs remains challenging due to the need for precise, composable transformation decisions. Recent LLM-guided approaches frame tensor program optimization as an iterative decision process, but existing datasets provide only end-to-end optimized program pairs using token-inefficient representations, lacking verifiable step-level supervision and interpretability. As a result, LLMs struggle to make reliable single-step decisions in large combinatorial optimization spaces. We introduce Step-TP, a post-training dataset for tensor program optimization that provides grounded, atomic, step-level supervision with structured chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning. Step-TP forms a closed reasoning loop over intermediate program states, enabling reliable multi-step optimization rather than outcome imitation. Its design is guided by four principles: (i) a token-efficient, verifiable intermediate representation (IR) that deterministically lowers to TVM TIR; (ii) atomic and composable optimization strategies that decompose complex trajectories into interpretable single-step decisions; (iii) structured CoT supervision coupled with explicit IR-to-IR state transitions; and (iv) strategy filtering to balance coverage while preventing shortcut exploitation. The dataset and implementation are available at a GitHub link, https://github.com/LIUMENGFAN-gif/StepTP.
2605.25954.paper_summary_zh: 儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）具有強大的推理能力，但由於需要精確的、可組合的轉換決策，優化張量程序的執行效率仍然具有挑戰性。最近的LLM引導方法將張量程序優化框架設置為一個迭代決策過程，但現有數據集僅提供使用令牌效率低下的表示法的端到端優化程序對，缺乏可驗證的步驟級監督和可解釋性。因此，LLMs在大型組合優化空間中難以做出可靠的單步決策。我們介紹了Step-TP，這是一個針對張量程序優化的後訓練數據集，提供了基於結構化思維鏈（CoT）推理的有根據的、原子級的步驟級監督。Step-TP在中間程序狀態上形成了一個封閉的推理循環，使得可靠的多步優化成為可能，而不是結果模仿。它的設計遵循四個原則：（i）一個令牌效率高、可驗證的中間表示（IR），可以確定性地降低到TVM TIR；（ii）原子和可組合的優化策略，將複雜的軌跡分解為可解釋的單步決策；（iii）結構化的CoT監督，結合明確的IR到IR狀態轉換；以及（iv）策略過濾，以平衡覆蓋率，同時防止捷徑利用。該數據集和實現可在GitHub鏈接 https://github.com/LIUMENGFAN-gif/StepTP 獲得。
2605.25954.author: Mengfan Liu et.al.
2605.25954.authors: Mengfan Liu, Da Zheng, Junwei Su, Chuan Wu
